detail.description:
This game includes optional in-game purchases, including random virtual items.

Step into Teyvat, a vast world teeming with life and flowing with elemental energy.

You and your sibling arrived here from another world. Separated by an unknown god, stripped of your powers, and cast into a deep slumber, you now awake to a world very different from when you first arrived.

Thus begins your journey across Teyvat to seek answers from The Seven — the gods of each element. Along the way, prepare to exp
detail.recentChanges:
Version "Luna VII," Song of the Welkin Moon: Andante — Truth Amongst the Pages of Purana, is now available!
New Characters: Nicole, Lohen, Prune
New Events: Version Main Event "Phantasmal Pals," etc.
New Stories: New Archon Quests and Story Quest
Miliastra Wonderland Update: New Manekin Cosmetics and Lobby
New Artifacts: Celestial Gift Set, Disenchantment in Deep Shadow Set
New Weapons: Angelos' Heptades, Disaster and Remorse
TCG Update: New Character Cards and Action Cards
